resources.title: Command Centre
resources.description: Your daily triage dashboard. Shows all accounts, booking status vs targets, and flags anything red. Open this first every morning.

resources.title: Client Check-In Sheet
resources.description: Structured check-in tracker for all accounts. Log your Monday/Thursday updates here.

resources.title: LogBook
resources.description: Central source of truth for ALL lead data across every account. Every lead from every account is documented by VAs. Request access from Leila.

resources.title: Account Specific Document
resources.description: VA cheat sheet template — service area, hours, owner name, calendar login, lead Q&A. Every new account gets one.

resources.title: FB Duty SOP
resources.description: Protocol for Facebook ad account monitoring, troubleshooting, and daily duties.

resources.title: Compensation Structure
resources.description: Full breakdown of pod manager compensation, bonus structure, and cycle-based earnings.

tools.title: Slack
tools.description: Primary internal comms. All pod updates, escalations, and team communication happen here.

tools.title: GHL / CRM
tools.description: GoHighLevel — client CRM and pipeline management. All sub-accounts and client data live here.

tools.title: ClickUp
tools.description: Task and project management. Use for Emmanuel setup tasks, Ken creative requests, and all internal assignments.

tools.title: Meta Business Manager
tools.description: Facebook/Instagram ads management. Never create a BM for a client — they must own it themselves.

tools.title: Fathom
tools.description: Call recording and transcription. Every onboarding call and review call is recorded here.

tools.title: Ad Set Reviewer
tools.description: QA tool for reviewing creatives before launch. You're approving setups — know these standards cold.

sops.title: Onboarding Call SOP
sops.description: Step-by-step protocol for running a new client onboarding call. Pre-call prep, during-call checklist, and post-call actions within 1 hour.

sops.title: ANDROMEDA Creative Diversification Playbook
sops.description: Framework for creative diversification across ad accounts. Prevents creative fatigue and scales winning creatives systematically.

sops.title: Command Centre CSM Guide
sops.description: How to use the Command Centre dashboard for account health monitoring, triage, and escalation.

sops.title: Creative Mastery: Ad Set 101
sops.description: Foundation for building high-converting ad sets. Covers creative formats, placement strategy, and the 6 allowed placements.

sops.title: Roofing B2C Ads Buildout
sops.description: Copy and headline frameworks for roofing ad campaigns. The primary niche — know this cold.

sops.title: CRM Integration SOP
sops.description: How to connect client CRMs, set up integrations, and ensure lead data flows correctly into GHL.

sops.title: Follow Up Protocol SOP
sops.description: VA follow-up sequences, timing, and escalation triggers. How we ensure no lead goes cold.

sops.title: Client Check-In System SOP
sops.description: The structured check-in cadence — what to cover, when to escalate, and how to document account health.

sops.title: Hail Mary Actions
sops.description: Documented history of last-resort interventions that saved struggling accounts. Study these before escalating to Jonathan.

sops.title: Creative Construction Mastery SOP
sops.description: How to brief Ken, structure creative requests, and build ad creatives that convert for roofing clients.

sops.title: Winter Retainer Plan SOP
sops.description: How to handle seasonal slowdowns — winter retainer structure, client conversations, and maintaining relationships during off-season.

sops.title: Color Grading System SOP
sops.description: Visual standards for ad creatives — color treatment, brand consistency, and approval process for Ken's work.

sops.title: Ad Scaling Strategies Playbook
sops.description: When and how to scale winning campaigns — budget increase triggers, creative expansion, and avoiding algorithm resets.

sops.title: Creative Testing Playbook
sops.description: Structured testing framework for new creatives — isolation testing, reading results, and killing losers fast.

sops.title: Testimonial Request SOP
sops.description: How and when to ask for client video testimonials — scripts, timing, and follow-up to maximize collection rate.
